message:
chore: consolidate target patterns in gitignore

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -1,5 +1,6 @@
-# Build artifacts
-/target/
+# Build artifacts (all target directories)
+target/
+target*/
 
 # Cargo lock for library crates (keep for binary crates)
 # Cargo.lock
@@ -18,9 +19,7 @@ Thumbs.db
 /legacy_beads/
 
 
-# Added by cargo
-
-/target
+# Added by cargo (covered by target*/ above)
 
 # bv (beads viewer) local config and caches
 .bv/
@@ -32,8 +31,6 @@ Thumbs.db
 SESSION_STATUS.md
 a.out
 
-# Temp build directories (never commit)
-target.old*/
-target_new/
+# Temp directories and crash reports
 temp_test*/
 rustc-ice-*.txt
